summary: Google Sheets Lead Connector feature testing completed. Backend: 16/18 tests passed (89%), 2 skipped because OAuth not configured. Frontend: Lead Connectors page renders correctly with all required UI elements. Marketing sidebar shows 'Lead Connectors' instead of 'Meta Ads Leads'. Leads Pool page still works correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login successful with test credentials
Backend: GET /api/connectors/config requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/connectors/config returns google_sheets_configured status (false - not configured)
Backend: GET /api/connectors/google-sheets requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/connectors/google-sheets returns list of connectors (empty)
Backend: GET /api/connectors/agents requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/connectors/agents returns list of sales agents with correct roles
Backend: POST /api/connectors/google-sheets validates required fields (422 for empty data)
Backend: POST /api/connectors/google-sheets returns 400 when OAuth not configured
Backend: PUT /api/connectors/google-sheets/:id returns 404 for nonexistent connector
Backend: DELETE /api/connectors/google-sheets/:id returns 404 for nonexistent connector
Backend: GET /api/connectors/google-sheets/:id/oauth requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/connectors/google-sheets/:id/oauth returns 400/404 when not configured
Backend: POST /api/connectors/google-sheets/:id/sync requires connected sheet
Backend: GET /api/connectors/google-sheets/:id/preview requires connected sheet
Backend: GET /api/leads with in_pool=true returns leads in pool (Leads Pool works)
Frontend: Marketing section icon visible on homepage
Frontend: Lead Connectors page loads with correct data-testid
Frontend: Page title 'Lead Connectors' is visible
Frontend: Refresh button is visible and clickable
Frontend: Add Connector button is visible and clickable
Frontend: 'Google Sheets Not Configured' warning displayed (expected)
Frontend: Empty state 'No Connectors Yet' displayed when no connectors
Frontend: Add Connector dialog opens with all required fields
Frontend: Dialog has Connector Name input
Frontend: Dialog has Google Sheet URL input
Frontend: Dialog has Sheet Tab Name input
Frontend: Dialog has 'Assign Leads To' section with agent checkboxes
Frontend: Dialog has Auto Sync toggle
Frontend: Dialog has Default Column Mapping info (N=Name, O=City, P=Phone, Q=Secondary, B=Time)
Frontend: Dialog has Create Connector button
Frontend: Leads Pool page loads and displays leads table
Frontend: Leads Pool shows Total in Pool, SLA Breached, Available Agents stats
Frontend: 'Meta Ads Leads' NOT in sidebar (correctly refactored)
Frontend: 'Lead Connectors' is in Marketing sidebar
skipped_tests: test_create_connector_without_oauth - Skipped because Google OAuth not configured (expected)
test_update_connector - Skipped because no connector created (depends on create test)
test_delete_connector - Skipped because no connector created (depends on create test)
critical_code_review_comments: Google Sheets Connector APIs are well-implemented with proper validation and error handling
All endpoints correctly require authentication (super_admin, admin, or marketing roles)
POST create connector correctly rejects requests when OAuth not configured
GET agents endpoint correctly filters for sales roles only (sales_executive, team_leader, sales_manager)
Lead Connectors UI has all required fields including agent selection for round-robin distribution
Default column mapping matches spec: N=Full Name, O=City, P=Primary Phone, Q=Secondary Phone, B=Captured Time
Marketing sidebar correctly shows 'Lead Connectors' instead of 'Meta Ads Leads'
Leads Pool page continues to work correctly showing unassigned leads

success_rate.backend: 89% (16/18 passed, 2 skipped due to OAuth not configured)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Sheets Lead Connector feature implemented. API endpoints at /api/connectors/* work correctly. OAuth is NOT configured (GOOGLE_SHEETS_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_SHEETS_CLIENT_SECRET not set in backend/.env), so full OAuth flow and connector creation cannot be tested. The POST /api/connectors/google-sheets endpoint correctly returns 400 with 'Google Sheets not configured' message when credentials are missing. Frontend UI at /marketing/connectors shows proper empty state and Add Connector dialog with all required fields. Leads Pool at /leads/pool works correctly.

feature_verification.GET /api/connectors/google-sheets: WORKING - Returns empty array when no connectors
feature_verification.GET /api/connectors/agents: WORKING - Returns list of sales agents
feature_verification.POST /api/connectors/google-sheets: WORKING - Returns 400 'Google Sheets not configured' (OAuth not set up)
feature_verification.Marketing sidebar 'Lead Connectors': WORKING - Shows instead of 'Meta Ads Leads'
feature_verification./marketing/connectors page: WORKING - Empty state, warning, Add button visible
feature_verification.Add Connector dialog: WORKING - All fields present including agent selection
feature_verification.Leads Pool page: WORKING - Shows leads with stats and table

oauth_notes: Google Sheets OAuth is NOT configured. To enable full functionality, add GOOGLE_SHEETS_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_SHEETS_CLIENT_SECRET to backend/.env file.
